content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "約時間見面",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我們明天下午三點見面，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3men ming2tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 jian4mian4, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, shall we meet tomorrow at 3 PM?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 내일 오후 3시에 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可以，沒問題。在哪裡見面？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, méi wèntí. Zài nǎlǐ jiànmiàn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2. Zai4 na3li3 jian4mian4?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, no problem. Where shall we meet?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 괜찮아요. 어디서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "在捷運站出口一，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zài jiéyùn zhàn chūkǒu yī, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zai4 jie2yun4 zhan4 chu1kou3 yi1, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "At MRT station exit 1, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "지하철역 1번 출구에서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，我準時到。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ zhǔnshí dào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 zhun3shi2 dao4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll be there on time.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 제 시간에 도착할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝，明天見！",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, míngtiān jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie, ming2tian1 jian4!",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, see you tomorrow!",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 내일 뵙겠습니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What time will they meet?",
          "question_ko": "몇 시에 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["2 PM", "3 PM", "4 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["오후 2시", "오후 3시", "오후 4시"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice sending a message to a friend to confirm a meeting time and place."
    },
    {
      "title": "遲到通知",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對不起，我快到了，但是路上塞車。",
          "pinyin": "Duìbuqǐ, wǒ kuài dào le, dànshì lùshàng sāichē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4bu5qi3, wo3 kuai4 dao4 le, dan4shi4 lu4shang4 sai1che1.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I'm almost there, but there's a traffic jam.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 거의 도착했는데 길이 막혀요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒關係，你慢慢來，我等你。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, nǐ mànman lái, wǒ děng nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi, ni3 man4man5 lai2, wo3 deng3 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, take your time, I'll wait for you.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 천천히 오세요, 기다릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝你，我大概再十分鐘到。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie nǐ, wǒ dàgài zài shí fēnzhōng dào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie ni3, wo3 da4gai4 zai4 shi2 fen1zhong1 dao4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll be there in about ten more minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 아마 10분 후에 도착할 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，沒問題，你路上小心。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, méi wèntí, nǐ lùshàng xiǎoxīn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, mei2 wen4ti2, ni3 lu4shang4 xiao3xin1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, no problem, be careful on the road.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 괜찮아요, 길 조심하세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，等一下見。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, děng yīxià jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, see you in a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 잠시 후에 뵙겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why is A late?",
          "question_ko": "A가 늦은 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Traffic jam", "Overslept", "Lost"],
          "options_ko": ["교통 체증", "늦잠", "길을 잃음"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice sending a message to a friend to explain you are running late."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認地址",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我想確認一下見面的地址。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià jiànmiàn de dìzhǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 que4ren4 yi1xia4 jian4mian4 de5 di4zhi3.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to confirm the meeting address.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 만날 주소를 확인하고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，地址是台北市大安區信義路三段一百號。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, dìzhǐ shì Táiběi Shì Dà'ān Qū Xìnyì Lù Sān Duàn yībǎi hào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, di4zhi3 shi4 Tai2bei3 Shi4 Da4'an1 Qu1 Xin4yi4 Lu4 San1 Duan4 yi1bai3 hao4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, the address is No. 100, Section 3, Xinyi Road, Da'an District, Taipei City.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 주소는 타이베이시 다안구 신이루 3단 100번지입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝，是在咖啡店嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, shì zài kāfēi diàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie, shi4 zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, is it at a coffee shop?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 커피숍인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，在一樓的咖啡店。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, zài yī lóu de kāfēi diàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, zai4 yi1 lou2 de5 ka1fei1 dian4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, at the coffee shop on the first floor.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 1층에 있는 커피숍이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，我知道了，謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le, xièxie nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le, xie4xie ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I see, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不客氣，等一下見。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì, děng yīxià jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4, deng3 yi1xia4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome, see you in a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요, 잠시 후에 뵙겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where will they meet?",
          "question_ko": "어디서 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A restaurant", "A coffee shop", "A park"],
          "options_ko": ["식당", "커피숍", "공원"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice sending a message to confirm an address for a meeting."
    }
  ]
}
